notFound.title: Ba a Sami Shafin Ba
notFound.description: Shafin da kake nema ba ya wanzu ko kuma an matsar da shi.

home.heroBadge: Muna yi wa al'ummomin ƙasa hidima da alfahari tun 1952
home.heroDescription: Ka haɗa kai da membobi 175,000+ waɗanda suke cin gajiyar kyawawan riba, ƙananan kuɗaɗe, da sabis na kai tsaye. A matsayin ƙungiyar bashi marar riba, jin daɗin kuɗinka shine manufarmu kaɗai.
home.productsDescription: Daga banki na yau da kullum zuwa manyan abubuwan rayuwa, muna da mafita daidai a gare ka.
home.whyChooseUsTitle: Me Ya Sa Membobi 175,000+ Suka Zaɓe Mu
home.whyChooseUsDescription: A matsayin ƙungiyar bashi mallakin membobi, muna saka hannun jari a cikin kayan aiki da sabis da suka fi muhimmanci a gare ka.
home.ctaTitle: Kana a Shirye Ka Shiga Iyalin Ƙungiyar Bashi?
home.ctaDescription: Buɗe asusunka cikin mintoci — ta yanar gizo ko a kowace resharmu. Zama memba yana buɗe ga kowa a cikin al'ummarmu.
